title: helictotrichon alpinum subsp. adsurgens
intro: Helictotrichon alpinum subsp. adsurgens, also known as mountain oat grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helictotrichon alpinum subsp. adsurgens include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
